title: SessionReview

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

sessionRef.description: URN of the AgentSession being reviewed.

summaryRef.description: URN of the artifact containing the human-readable session summary.

learnedMemoryRefs.description: URNs of MemoryEntry records created or updated as a result of this session.

followupRefs.description: URNs of follow-up AgentSessions created to handle deferred work.

reviewedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this review was completed.

description: A post-session retrospective record linking session outcomes to learned memory entries and identifying follow-up sessions needed for deferred or incomplete work.
